src: A sleek silver hatchback with black alloy wheels, yellow accents on the grille and mirrors. It has rounded headlights, a streamlined front bumper, tinted windows, and smooth, aerodynamic lines.
edit: A futuristic spaceship capsule with a streamlined silver metallic body, sleek black accents, thrusters, a panoramic viewing panel with a futuristic insignia, side panels with glowing patterns, and rear vibrant energy trails.

per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-72PbiQhHJHM-unsplash: the object is on a two-lane road, angled slightly to the right, with trees and a vast field under a vibrant sunset sky in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-E5QW_maORfg-unsplash: The object faces forward on an asphalt road, with golden fields on either side, distant trees, and a cloudy sky blending into the horizon.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-ERdWJrv9FeY-unsplash: The object faces forward on a concrete surface with a wall and overcast sky in the background, sunlight subtly illuminating the scene.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-N1p9Ih0qq-c-unsplash: the object angled slightly to the left on an asphalt road, surrounded by sunflowers, near a distant tree line under a colorful sky
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-OfM1G5mWrdU-unsplash: The object angled to the right on a gravel surface, against an industrial building with corrugated metal sides, under overcast skies.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-WyZh1SAPLQw-unsplash: The object angled left on a concrete area, partially shadowed by large, curved metal structures like a hangar, under soft ambient light.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-jUlXwWok3xY-unsplash: the object is angled to the left on wide concrete, surrounded by low walls and sparse foliage under a sunset light
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-maU12ShTjtY-unsplash: The object in the center of a two-lane road, slightly angled, with grass fields and a fence on both sides, under a setting sun casting dramatic lighting.
per_image_non_shared_src.martin-katler-nH6uHS1g5Vw-unsplash: The object is angled to the right on a road, centered on lane lines, with trees and a cloudy sky colored by a setting sun.

per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-72PbiQhHJHM-unsplash: A sleek object is on a neon-lit, two-lane road, angled slightly right, amid a cyberpunk metropolis. Towering buildings and virtual billboards flash colors in the background, with digital trees under a vibrant sunset sky casting neon hues.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-E5QW_maORfg-unsplash: The object faces forward on a neon-lit asphalt road, reflecting vibrant city lights. Background has cyber-enhanced fields glowing electric blue, with distant digital trees. The sky is futuristic with pink and purple neon hues, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-ERdWJrv9FeY-unsplash: The object stands on a sleek neon-lit surface, with a wall of futuristic graffiti and an electric blue digital sky in the background. Neon lights illuminate the scene, casting reflections in a cyberpunk style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-N1p9Ih0qq-c-unsplash: A futuristic object, glowing neon blue and purple, angled left on an asphalt road. It's surrounded by fields of LED-lit sunflowers, near a distant tree line with digital displays. The sky has vibrant, synthesized colors of cyberpunk aesthetics.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-OfM1G5mWrdU-unsplash: A sleek, futuristic object angled to the right on a neon-hued gravel surface, against an industrial building with holographic metal panels. Above, the sky is digitalized with electric blues and violets in cyberpunk style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-WyZh1SAPLQw-unsplash: The object is angled left on a neon-lit concrete surface, illuminated by digital signs, shadowed by sleek metallic structures evoking a futuristic cityscape with holographic advertisements flickering, and ambient light of electric blues and purples, like a cyberpunk street scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-jUlXwWok3xY-unsplash: The object is angled to the left against a metallic surface reflecting neon lights. It is surrounded by illuminated glass walls, vibrant hues, and sparse bioluminescent plants under a purple-orange twilight, in a cyberpunk style.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-maU12ShTjtY-unsplash: An object stands on a neon-lit street, slightly angled, amid glowing holograms, with digital landscapes and electric barriers on either side, under cyberpunk lights casting vivid hues and shadows, enhancing the futuristic cityscape.
per_image_non_shared_edit.martin-katler-nH6uHS1g5Vw-unsplash: An object angled to the right on a neon-lit street, centered on holographic lane lines, flanked by skyscrapers and digital billboards. LED lights cast patterns, creating a vibrant, fluorescent atmosphere with reflective surfaces and high-tech architecture against a digital skyline.
